name: Pizza Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate and unroll the breadsticks.
2. Place 3 pepperoni slices in a single layer over one half of each breadstick.
3. Fold the remaining half of the breadstick over top and seal the end, twisting it.
4. Place the breadsticks on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Combine the cheese, Italian seasoning, and garlic powder.
6. Sprinkle evenly over each breadstick.
7. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve with pizza sauce. Makes 8 pizza sticks.
